ideation: This sequence aims to capture the act of putting on a disguise, specifically glasses and a nose, using both arms in a coordinated motion.  In the first frame, both arms are down at the sides, relaxed and prepared for movement.  The second frame has the arms moving upwards towards the face, as if picking up the disguise.  The third frame positions the arms near the face, simulating the placement of glasses and a fake nose. The fourth frame shows the arms moving slightly away from the face, as if adjusting the disguise. Finally, the arms return to a relaxed position at the sides, completing the sequence and implying the disguise is in place.

frames.beat: arms hang at sides, ready for disguise
both arms lift towards the face, reaching
arms bring disguise elements to the face
adjusting the new glasses and nose carefully
disguise in place, arms relax back down
